intro.title: MYX Trade SDK
intro.description: Welcome to MYX Trade SDK! This is a powerful JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for interacting with the MYX trading platform.

SDK_INTEGRATION_GUIDE.title: SDK Integration Guide
SDK_INTEGRATION_GUIDE.description: This guide will help you quickly integrate MYX Trade SDK into your application.

subscription.title: Subscription Module
subscription.description: The Subscription module provides WebSocket connection functionality with the MYX trading platform for subscribing to real-time market data, user orders, and position information.
